THE 7 AGENTS THAT RECLAIM YOUR WEEK

This isn't another church software to learn. This is a digital ministry team that works however you already work.

Sermon Architect

5 hrs → 2 hrs per week

Deep exegesis, manuscript drafting, small group guides, children's adaptations—all in your voice.

Church Administrator

15 hrs → 5 hrs per week

Member database, event coordination, volunteer scheduling, budget tracking—automated.

Pastoral Care Coordinator

2 hrs → 0.5 hrs per week

Prayer requests, hospital visits, bereavement support, encrypted counseling notes.

Communications Director

3 hrs → 0 hrs per week

Weekly newsletter, social media posts, event promotion—scheduled and sent automatically.

Worship Planner

2 hrs → 0.5 hrs per week

Song selection, liturgy planning, tech coordination, CCLI reporting—done.

Discipleship Coordinator

3 hrs → 1 hr per week

Small group curriculum, Sunday School lessons, new member classes, mentorship matching.

Outreach Coordinator

2 hrs → 0.5 hrs per week

Visitor follow-up (30-day automated sequence), community events, growth tracking.

💡Total time saved: 13+ hours weekly = 650+ hours annually
